creator: david@catwhisker.org
text:
On Thu, Oct 27, 2011 at 10:55:48PM +0100, Simon L. B. Nielsen wrote:
> ... 
> On 7 Jun 2011, at 15:40, Johann Kois wrote:
> 
> > I have added the following mailinglists to the documentation and the
> > website (www.FreeBSD.org/search) in the last couple of months:
> > 
> > - - freebsd-wireless
> > - - freebsd-chromium
> > - - freebsd-tilera
> > - - freebsd-toolchain
> > - - freebsd-sysinstall (not added by me, but also not there on
> > docs.FreeBSD.org/mail)
> > 
> > I did not add them on http://docs.freebsd.org/mail as I have no idea
> > where/how to add them.
> > 
> > Anyone out there who knows who could fix/change this?
> 
> Hey,
> 
> I can't recall if dhw (postmaster) normally adds them to that or that he doesn't... the latter makes sense as think he wouldn't forget if it was part of his procedure :-).

Yeah -- my "new list" procedure involves updating
/usr/local/www/bin/domailindex (for the WAIS indexing) and submittinga
docs PR for the Handbook.  I don't have a procedure for any other
docs/www stuff for a new (or deleted, for that matter) list.

> Then it's probably wosch@ who have done it in the past... wosch, can you add the missing lists or point dhw and me towards where they need to be added? AFAIR it's fairly simple... I just can't recall the needed magic....
> ...

Peace,
david   (current hat: postmaster@freebsd.org)
-- 
David H. Wolfskill				david@catwhisker.org
Depriving a girl or boy of an opportunity for education is evil.

See http://www.catwhisker.org/~david/publickey.gpg for my public key.
